title: Asset Header
description: Core asset catalog/header data describing an asset's identity, issuing organisation(s), and on-chain representations. Designed to apply across asset classes (securities, funds, stablecoins, digital commodities, tokenised RWAs).

fileReference.description: Reference to an attached file. fileName and mimeType describe the file so it can be rendered (image, PDF, …) without fetching it first.

mimeType.description: IANA media type of the file, e.g. "application/pdf", "image/png".

assetReference.description: Asset reference (e.g. contract address, slip44 coin type)

issuanceMode.description: How the asset is represented on this chain. "native": the token is the asset itself, primary issuance on this chain (e.g. BTC on Bitcoin, USDC on Ethereum, BUIDL where the on-chain token is the legal share record). "wrapped": represents the same asset that lives natively on another blockchain, with custody held on-chain in a bridge contract or vault (e.g. WBTC, USDC.e). "twin": represents an off-chain real-world asset with custody held off-chain by a depository or transfer agent (e.g. tokenised AAPL shares, tokenised T-bills).

additionalIdentifier.description: Non-primary asset identifier. Industry-standard identifier types are enumerated to keep downstream consumers consistent.

type.description: Asset-level identifier type. ISIN (ISO 6166), CUSIP, SEDOL, FIGI (OpenFIGI), DTI (ISO 24165), RIC (Refinitiv), BBGID (Bloomberg), WKN (German), VALOR (Swiss). LEI is issuer-level (see issuingOrg[].id); CFI is a top-level field on this header (cfiCode).

value.description: Identifier value under the chosen scheme.

assetPublicInfoItem.description: Public info entry for the asset (name / type / value) — either a text note or a link. Same shape as the KYA info item.

name.description: Label for the public info entry.

type.description: Entry type — plain text or a link (URL).

value.description: Entry value — text content when type=text; URL when type=link.

name.description: The legal name of the asset or financial instrument.

symbol.description: A short display identifier for the asset. May be shared across multiple markets or platforms and is not guaranteed to be unique.

assetClass.description: The high-level classification of the asset, describing its financial category.

cfiCode.description: Classification of Financial Instruments code (ISO 10962). Optional structured counterpart to `category`.

issuingOrg.description: Issuing organisation — carries the org's legal name, an identifier (currently LEI only), and country of incorporation. Inlined into the header (separate Issuer schema is out of scope for epic #1236).

org_name.description: Legal name of the issuing organisation.

type.description: Identifier scheme. Only LEI is supported for now.

value.description: Identifier value under the chosen scheme. For LEI (ISO 17442): 20-character code.

country.description: Issuer country of incorporation, ISO 3166-1 alpha-2.

additionalIdentifiers.description: Asset identifiers as an array of {type, value} entries; carries ISIN, CUSIP, FIGI, DTI, etc.

assetPublicInfo.description: Public info entries for the asset. Each item is a labelled entry that is either plain text or a link.
